title: Commonweave Map Edge
description: A single relationship between two organizations on the Commonweave map. Phase 1 stub.

id.description: Stable edge id, typically edge_<source>_<target> with the lexicographically smaller id first.

source_id.description: Stable id of one endpoint, e.g. org_12345.

target_id.description: Stable id of the other endpoint.

edge_type.description: The kind of connection. Phase 1 only emits the two proximity types; Phase 2 adds the rest.

weight.description: Numeric strength of the connection in [0,1].

derived.description: True if generated by an algorithm, false if a human asserted the relationship.

evidence.description: Pointers to the data that supports this edge. Empty for derived edges in Phase 1.

explanation.description: Plain-language description of why this edge exists.

source_script.description: Path to the script that produced this edge.
